testcases.Test Description: Verifies that writing to the GPIO output data register (GPIOA_ODR) for PA0 reflects in register readback when the pin is configured as output.
Test Steps / Procedure: Enable GPIOA peripheral clock: set RCC_AHB1ENR bit[0] = 1.
Configure PA0 as output: clear GPIOA_MODER bits[1:0], then set bit[0] = 1 (01b for output).
Drive PA0 high: write GPIOA_ODR |= (1 << 0).
Readback check (HIGH): verify (GPIOA_ODR & (1 << 0)) != 0; on failure, log "FAIL: GPIO WRITE HIGH" and halt.
Drive PA0 low: write GPIOA_ODR &= ~(1 << 0).
Readback check (LOW): verify (GPIOA_ODR & (1 << 0)) == 0; on failure, log "FAIL: GPIO WRITE LOW" and halt.
If both checks pass, print "GPIO REG WR/RD TEST PASSED" and loop.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: PASS when: (GPIOA_ODR & (1 << 0)) != 0 after setting bit 0 AND (GPIOA_ODR & (1 << 0)) == 0 after clearing bit 0; success message: "GPIO REG WR/RD TEST PASSED".
FAIL when: condition after set is false → prints "FAIL: GPIO WRITE HIGH"; or condition after clear is true → prints "FAIL: GPIO WRITE LOW"; program halts.
testcases.Gap Analysis: The test verifies ODR register readback only; it does not confirm electrical level on the pin or input data register (IDR) reflection. No use of BSRR or timing/drive strength checks.

testcases.Feature: EXTI falling-edge trigger enable on alternate pads (lines 0,2,4,6)
testcases.Test Description: Enables falling-edge trigger selection on EXTI lines for alternate pads (0, 2, 4, 6) and verifies the configuration bits are set.
Test Steps / Procedure: For each pin in {0, 2, 4, 6}:
- Set EXTI_FTSR bit[pin] = 1 to enable falling-edge trigger.
- Readback check: verify (EXTI_FTSR & (1 << pin)) != 0; on failure, log "FAIL: NEDGE ALT PAD" and halt.
If all four pins pass the readback check, print "GPIO NEDGE ALT PADS TEST PASSED" and loop.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: PASS when: for pins 0, 2, 4, 6, each (EXTI_FTSR & (1 << pin)) != 0 after write; success message: "GPIO NEDGE ALT PADS TEST PASSED".
FAIL when: any pin's readback is 0 → prints "FAIL: NEDGE ALT PAD"; program halts.
testcases.Gap Analysis: EXTI line mapping/masking and GPIO mode are not configured here; no validation of interrupt firing, pending flag, or ISR execution—only configuration bit set is checked.

testcases.Feature: EXTI negative-edge interrupt enable on line 1 (PA1)
testcases.Test Description: Configures PA1 as input, maps it to EXTI1, unmasks EXTI1, enables falling-edge trigger, and verifies the falling-trigger selection bit is set.
Test Steps / Procedure: Enable clocks: set RCC_AHB1ENR bit[0] (GPIOA) and RCC_APB2ENR bit[14] (SYSCFG).
Configure PA1 as input: clear GPIOA_MODER bits[(1*2)+1 : (1*2)] (i.e., bits 3:2) to 00.
Map PA1 to EXTI1: clear SYSCFG_EXTICR1 bits[7:4] = 0000 (select port A).
Unmask EXTI line 1: set EXTI_IMR bit[1] = 1.
Enable falling-edge trigger: set EXTI_FTSR bit[1] = 1.
Readback check: verify (EXTI_FTSR & (1 << 1)) != 0; on failure, log "FAIL: NEG EDGE NOT ENABLED" and halt.
If check passes, print "GPIO NEG EDGE INTR TEST PASSED" and loop.
testcases.Impacted Registers: RCC_AHB1ENR, RCC_APB2ENR, GPIOA_MODER, SYSCFG_EXTICR1, EXTI_IMR, EXTI_FTSR
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: PASS when: (EXTI_FTSR & (1 << 1)) != 0 after configuration; success message: "GPIO NEG EDGE INTR TEST PASSED".
FAIL when: (EXTI_FTSR & (1 << 1)) == 0 → prints "FAIL: NEG EDGE NOT ENABLED"; program halts.
testcases.Gap Analysis: No verification of EXTI pending flag, NVIC routing, or ISR execution; IMR bit readback is not checked; actual external signal-induced interrupt is not validated.

testcases.Feature: EXTI rising-edge trigger enable on all pads (lines 0–7)
testcases.Test Description: Enables rising-edge trigger selection for EXTI lines 0 through 7 and verifies each configuration bit is set.
Test Steps / Procedure: For each i from 0 to 7:
- Set EXTI_RTSR bit[i] = 1 to enable rising-edge trigger.
- Readback check: verify (EXTI_RTSR & (1 << i)) != 0; on failure, log "FAIL: PEDGE ALL PADS" and halt.
If all eight lines pass the readback check, print "GPIO PEDGE ALL PADS TEST PASSED" and loop.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: PASS when: for i = 0..7, each (EXTI_RTSR & (1 << i)) != 0 after write; success message: "GPIO PEDGE ALL PADS TEST PASSED".
FAIL when: any line's readback is 0 → prints "FAIL: PEDGE ALL PADS"; program halts.
testcases.Gap Analysis: Does not configure GPIO-to-EXTI mapping or input modes; no verification of actual interrupt events—only configuration bits are checked.

testcases.Feature: EXTI rising-edge trigger enable on alternate pads (lines 0,2,4,6)
testcases.Test Description: Enables rising-edge trigger selection on EXTI lines for alternate pads (0, 2, 4, 6) and verifies the configuration bits are set.
Test Steps / Procedure: For each pin in {0, 2, 4, 6}:
- Set EXTI_RTSR bit[pin] = 1 to enable rising-edge trigger.
- Readback check: verify (EXTI_RTSR & (1 << pin)) != 0; on failure, log "FAIL: PEDGE ALT PAD" and halt.
If all four pins pass the readback check, print "GPIO PEDGE ALT PADS TEST PASSED" and loop.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: PASS when: for pins 0, 2, 4, 6, each (EXTI_RTSR & (1 << pin)) != 0 after write; success message: "GPIO PEDGE ALT PADS TEST PASSED".
FAIL when: any pin's readback is 0 → prints "FAIL: PEDGE ALT PAD"; program halts.
testcases.Gap Analysis: No EXTI line mapping/masking or GPIO configuration; does not validate interrupt generation—only configuration bits are checked.
